attractions.name: Kek Lok Si Temple
attractions.description: Magnificent Buddhist temple complex, iconic seven-story pagoda and the giant Kuan Yin statue.

attractions.name: George Town UNESCO Zone
attractions.description: Historic colonial architecture, vibrant street art, clan jetties, and authentic local cafes.

attractions.name: Batu Ferringhi Beach
attractions.description: Golden sandy beach, water sports, night market & stunning sunset views.

attractions.name: Street Food Trail
attractions.description: Experience Penang's famous hawker culture with Char Kway Teow, Asam Laksa, and other delicious street food delicacies.

packageOffers.name: Seaside Escape Package
packageOffers.description: Enjoy a relaxing seaside getaway with ocean views, beach access, and premium amenities.

packageOffers.name: Snorkling Nature Package
packageOffers.description: Discover underwater wonders with guided snorkeling tours and nature excursions.

packageOffers.name: Hillside Adventure Package
packageOffers.description: Experience thrilling mountain trails, fresh air, and stunning panoramic views.

packageOffers.name: Beach Escape Package
packageOffers.description: Sun, sand, and sea - perfect beachfront getaway with water sports included.

packageOffers.name: Dual Nature Package
packageOffers.description: Best of both worlds - jungle trekking and beach relaxation combined.
